targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Alarms" FROM active_alarms WHERE DATE(raised_at) <= (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Service Affecting" FROM active_alarms WHERE is_service_affecting = true AND DATE(raised_at) <= (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1);
SELECT SUM(onu_count) AS "Total ONUs" FROM inventory WHERE collection_date = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT component) AS "Dead Ports" FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND value = -400 AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1);

SELECT device_name AS "Device", CASE WHEN online_state THEN 'ONLINE' ELSE 'OFFLINE' END AS "Status", ip_address AS "IP", hardware_type AS "Hardware", software_version AS "Software", onu_count AS "ONUs" FROM inventory WHERE collection_date = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY device_name;
SELECT severity AS "Severity", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM active_alarms GROUP BY severity ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT device_name AS "Device", alarm_type AS "Alarm Type", severity AS "Severity", is_service_affecting AS "Service Affecting", alarm_text AS "Details", raised_at AS "Raised At" FROM active_alarms ORDER BY is_service_affecting DESC, raised_at DESC;

SELECT collected_at AS time, 100 - value AS "CPU Usage %", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'HARDWARE' AND metric_name LIKE '%cpu-idle%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, value AS "Free Memory", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'HARDWARE' AND metric_name LIKE '%free-memory%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, value AS "Used Memory", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'HARDWARE' AND metric_name LIKE '%used-mem%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

panels.title: RX Power per PON Port (dBm) — Active Ports Only

targets.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, value AS "RX Power (dBm)", device_name || '/' || component AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND value > -400 AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT device_name AS "Device", component AS "PON Port", ROUND(value::numeric, 1) AS "RX Power (dBm)", CASE WHEN value = -400 THEN 'NO SIGNAL' WHEN value < -27 THEN 'WEAK' WHEN value BETWEEN -27 AND -8 THEN 'GOOD' ELSE 'CHECK' END AS "Status" FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND (device_name, component, collected_at) IN (SELECT device_name, component, MAX(collected_at) FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) GROUP BY device_name, component) ORDER BY device_name, component;

SELECT collected_at AS time, value AS "TX Power", device_name || '/' || component AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%tx-power%' AND value > -400 AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, (value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at)) AS "Drops", device_name || '/' || component AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'DROPS' AND metric_name LIKE '%discard%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, (value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at)) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at))), 0) * 8 AS "Throughput (bps)", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'TRAFFIC' AND metric_name LIKE '%in-octets%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, (value - LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at)) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (collected_at - LAG(collected_at) OVER (PARTITION BY device_name, component ORDER BY collected_at))), 0) * 8 AS "Throughput (bps)", device_name AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'TRAFFIC' AND metric_name LIKE '%out-octets%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) ORDER BY collected_at;
SELECT report_text::text AS "Report" FROM daily_reports WHERE report_date = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1);
